ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Defense, Goalie) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in feet-inches (e.g., 6-2) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Handedness of the player (e.g., Right, Left) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  "contract_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the player's current contract expires */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_overall" INTEGER /* Overall draft pick number */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "college" TEXT /* College or university the player attended */,
  "shot_percentage" TEXT /* Player's average shooting percentage */,
  "faceoff_percentage" TEXT /* Player's average faceoff win percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's head coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home arena */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's owner */,
  "general_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's general manager */,
  "assistant_coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's assistant coach */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id_home" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "team_id_away" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "final_score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "final_score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the main referee for the game */,
  "assistant_referee_1" TEXT /* Name of the first assistant referee */,
  "assistant_referee_2" TEXT /* Name of the second assistant referee */,
  "overtime" TEXT /* Whether the game went into overtime (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "shootout" TEXT /* Whether the game went into a shootout (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "home_team_shots" INTEGER /* Total shots taken by the home team */,
  "away_team_shots" INTEGER /* Total shots taken by the away team */,
  "home_team_power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Number of power play goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_team_power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Number of power play goals scored by the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id_away FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_away") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id_home FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_home") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points (goals + assists) by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating of the player */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the player */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Total penalty minutes of the player */,
  "face_off_wins" INTEGER /* Number of face-off wins by the player */,
  "face_off_losses" INTEGER /* Number of face-off losses by the player */,
  "time_on_ice" TEXT /* Total time on ice for the player in the game */,
  "shifts" INTEGER /* Number of shifts the player played */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits made by the player */,
  "takeaways" INTEGER /* Number of takeaways by the player */,
  "giveaways" INTEGER /* Number of giveaways by the player */,
  "blocked_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots blocked by the player */,
  "hits_taken" INTEGER /* Number of hits taken by the player */,
  "power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Number of power play goals scored by the player */,
  "short_handed_goals" INTEGER /* Number of short-handed goals scored by the player */,
  "game_winning_goals" INTEGER /* Number of game-winning goals scored by the player */,
  "plus_minus_per_game" TEXT /* Plus-minus rating per game */,
  "faceoff_percentage_per_game" TEXT /* Faceoff win percentage for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, fracture) */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "expected_return_date" TEXT /* Expected date the player will return to play */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., out, day-to-day) */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., Mild, Moderate, Severe) */,
  "injury_location" TEXT /* Location of the injury (e.g., Knee, Wrist) */,
  "injury_cause" TEXT /* Cause of the injury (e.g., Collision, Fall) */,
  "rehab_start_date" TEXT /* Date when rehabilitation started */,
  "rehab_end_date" TEXT /* Date when rehabilitation is expected to end */,
  "rehab_status" TEXT /* Current status of rehabilitation (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's current status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., player, game) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
